parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player because he contradicts his own role claim. He initially claimed to be a villager (line 80), but later claimed to be the Seer (line 93) and asserted that he saw a Werewolf and a Troublemaker in the center. This sudden shift in identity is a classic bluffing tactic used by Werewolves to divert suspicion and mislead the group about the location of the Werewolf cards.
